title: Count days between 2 dates
excerpt:
Hi everyone. 
I’m looking for a formula to make the following difference: today’s date minus the item’s creation date. 
I would like the result in days. 
For example, if the item was created on 1/1/2021 and today is 1/7/…

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone.
I’m looking for a formula to make the following difference: today’s date minus the item’s creation date.
I would like the result in days.

For example, if the item was created on 1/1/2021 and today is 1/7/2021 I would like the result “6”.

Thanks!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @AleRun - Absolutely! Here’s a short video clip to show you how: Screen Recording 2021-01-07... Let me know if you have any questions.

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
PolishedGeek:

Here’s a short video clip to show you how: Screen Recording 2021-01-07… Let me know if you have any questions.

Works!
Thanks for your help.
I searched several times among the functions of the Formula field … but I really ran away !!!

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml:
This formula works DAYS({Date records returned},{Date records uploaded})

For work days (remove weekend) I did this: WORKDAYS({Date records returned},{Date records uploaded})-1
